title: Analytics Manager
summary: Analytics Manager with 6 years of experience. Focused on measurable outcomes, cross-functional collaboration and reliable knowledge graph extraction signals. Core strengths include ETL, Tableau, Looker Studio, BigQuery.

experiences.description: Delivered measurable work in data / retail using Power BI, ETL, Tableau, Excel. Collaborated with product, engineering and operations teams to improve delivery quality.
